data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "epic plan-review is certified PASS (blocking=0, manifest signed); claim blocked ONLY by stale-head — the unscoped-container attestation stamped head_sha d4a0a2a4 (attested-mode ref) vs working HEAD 49ad69b, a ref-resolution artifact of the very unscoped-freshness limitation THIS epic fixes, not a content failure. Proceeding under user directive to fully implement the epic.".
